controls.title: Approved AI-agent inventory
controls.objective: Maintain a current inventory of AI agents, skills, MCPs, extensions, and automation surfaces.

controls.title: Skill provenance and review
controls.objective: Only approved skills from known sources may be installed or updated.

controls.title: Editor extension risk control
controls.objective: Classify VS Code/Cursor/Windsurf extensions that can execute code, read workspaces, call networks, or use AI.

controls.title: MCP and tool approval
controls.objective: Require approval before agents receive tools that access browsers, credentials, cloud APIs, databases, source control, or messaging.

controls.title: Secret access denial
controls.objective: Agents must not read, print, commit, summarize, or transmit secrets unless a narrowly approved break-glass process exists.

controls.title: Evidence retention
controls.objective: Keep tamper-evident evidence for inventories, approvals, scans, denials, exceptions, and incidents.

controls.title: Exception handling
controls.objective: Time-bound exceptions require owner, reason, expiry, compensating control, and re-review.

controls.title: Agent incident response
controls.objective: Investigate unintended command execution, data exposure, policy bypass, unsafe extension behavior, and credential exposure.
